label: Transparent Katydid motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Katydid transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated katydid with leaf-like wings for a design-system catalog; no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A single katydid insect with accurate anatomy, long antennae, angular legs, leaf-mimicking translucent green wings, visible vein network, lime edge highlights, darker moss-green body shadows, subtle summer canopy coloration, crisp silhouette edges, and natural wing texture. The insect should read as a katydid, not a grasshopper, mantis, cicada, or leaf insect.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show the full insect including antennae, legs, body, and leaf-like folded wing without cropping.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves leaf green, vein lime, dark olive shadows, and fine wing membrane detail.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for background removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Keep the subject fully separated from the background with crisp edges and generous padding. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no leaves as separate objects, no branch, no landscape, no second insect, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

label: Light design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for "Morphous Katydid" / "Katydid Leaf Wing", source reference for a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible theme.
Reference use: Use the previously generated isolated katydid motif as the visual source of truth. Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from its leaf-like wing, vein network, lime highlights, and dark olive shadows.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, 3840x2160 preferred, at least 2400px wide if possible.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution source board with large readable labels; do not overpack tiny token tables.
Required visible sections: title, motif story, palette, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status states, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
Palette: leaf green, vein lime, tender canopy cream, dark olive, moss shadow, translucent wing green, pale antenna gold, and quiet bark neutral. Use only motif-derived greens, limes, olives, warm pale highlights, and near-neutrals from the motif.
Typography: include English product UI guidance and Japanese examples such as "葉脈", "協働", "検索", "状態", and "設定". Favor calm, readable SaaS typography with multilingual support.
UI language: discreet collaboration system, compact product interface, shadcn/tweakcn style, precise grid, radius tokens capped at 8px, fine leaf-vein dividers, translucent wing panels, quiet collaboration badges, calm status colors, readable data cards, tables, forms, command menu, search field, tabs, switches, checkboxes, radio controls, alerts, loading/empty/error states, dashboard charts, side navigation, top navigation.
Visual details: leaf-vein linework as separators, wing membrane texture overlays, dark olive text, lime focus rings, muted cream surfaces, no oversized marketing hero section.
Text: short readable UI labels only; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no grasshopper label, no mantis, no cicada, no generic purple/blue gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no neon palette, no beige/brown dominance, no random brand names, no watermark. Keep all cards and controls at 8px radius or less.

label: Dark design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for "Morphous Katydid" / "Katydid Leaf Wing". It must feel like the same system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the isolated katydid motif and the light-mode Morphous Katydid board visible in context as source references. Preserve the same palette roles, component language, leaf-vein texture, compact spacing, 8px max radius, and English/Japanese typography guidance.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, 3840x2160 preferred, at least 2400px wide if possible.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution source board with large readable labels; avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: title, Dark Mode, palette, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status states, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
Dark palette: deep canopy black-green, moss shadow, dark olive, leaf green active states, vein lime focus rings, wing cream foreground, pale antenna gold highlights, muted bark neutral borders. Keep contrast restrained and readable, not neon.
Typography: include English product UI guidance and Japanese examples such as "葉脈", "協働", "検索", "状態", and "設定". Favor calm, readable SaaS typography with multilingual support.
UI language: discreet collaboration system, compact product interface, shadcn/tweakcn style, fine leaf-vein dividers, translucent wing panels, quiet collaboration badges, dark dashboard charts, data tables, forms, command menu, search field, tabs, switches, checkboxes, radio controls, alerts, loading/empty/error states, side navigation, top navigation.
Visual details: dark background from the katydid's deepest body shadows, subtle wing membrane texture overlays, lime ring states, muted dark cards, crisp borders, no oversized marketing hero section.
Text: short readable UI labels only; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no grasshopper label, no mantis, no cicada, no pure black flat background, no neon colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no random brand names, no watermark. Keep all cards and controls at 8px radius or less.
